description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The front features a wide driveway, a garage, and a main entrance flanked by landscaped trees and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a large rectangular swimming pool, surrounded by lounge chairs and additional greenery. Large windows and sliding glass doors are prominent throughout, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and light gray materials, with wood accents adding warmth to the design. The property is enclosed by a low perimeter wall, providing both privacy and a sense of openness.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a backyard pool, featuring minimalist landscaping and wood accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard pool, lounge area, and additional greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, lounge chairs, and open backyard layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible flat roof sections, side yard, and more trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, minimal steps, no porch, and flanked by landscaped trees
